name: Rochester Golf Room
about: Rochester Golf Room specializes in designing, building, and installing complete golf simulator rooms in homes, offices, or businesses. They offer a comprehensive service that covers every aspect of creating a golf and entertainment space, including room dimensions, launch monitor selection, lighting design, acoustical engineering, pre-wiring, impact screen installation, and turf setup. The company, a division of Resnick Renovations, provides an end-to-end solution for clients looking to integrate a golf simulator into their personal or professional environment, handling everything from design and construction to electrical work, flooring, equipment installation, and software training. For hands-on experience, they allow visitors to test their Uneekor EYEXO powered simulator by appointment at their Rochester office.
why_golfers_like_it: Custom room design and build services
Expert installation of Uneekor EYEXO technology
Comprehensive project management from start to finish

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator offering for testing and installation

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but since they offer club rentals as an amenity, they may provide clubs for testing purposes. It's best to confirm when booking your appointment.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service on-site, and no BYOB policy is stated. The venue appears focused on the golf simulator experience without mentioning dining options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't provide specific timing for simulator sessions. Duration would depend on the number of players, simulator settings, and software used during your session.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information about children's amenities or policies mentioned on the website. The facility appears geared toward serious golf practice and business installations rather than family entertainment.
